name: Breakfast Burritos
recipeIngredient: 6 potatoes, peeled and chopped into 1/4 inch cubes (hint - use your food processor and shred them!)
Optional: browned sausage or bacon, cooked chicken or turkey, shredded cheese, butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry eggs until done in a small amount of butter. Remove from pan to a large bowl.
2. Fry onion and green pepper in butter until tender; add to the bowl.
3. Fry potatoes in butter until they are soft but not mushy, and starting to brown. Add everything to the bowl and stir to mix.
4. Warm tortillas in microwave (20 seconds) until they are very flexible and warm.
5. Put about 1/2 cup of mixture into each tortilla. Roll up tightly and place on a cookie sheet with a light coat of non-stick spray.
6. Freeze rolls on the tray for about 10 minutes, then transfer to a freezer-safe container or bag.
7. To serve: warm in microwave about 2 and 1/2 minutes.
Note: This recipe is flexible and can be adjusted based on ingredients available. Additional eggs, less potatoes, no onion, etc., are all acceptable variations. A pre-made hash brown mix may also be used, but be mindful of added salt.
